title: Use mix test --seed to reproduce an order-dependent flake
prompt: A test passes when run alone but fails in 'mix test'. Write `docs/seed_reproduction.md` explaining the diagnostic procedure: (1) note the seed printed by the failing CI run, (2) reproduce locally via `mix test --seed <seed>`, (3) if reproduction succeeds, the flake is order-dependent, (4) narrow down by running `mix test --seed <seed> --failed` until you find the smallest failing set, (5) identify state leakage between the tests in that set. Must mention `--seed`, `--failed`, and 'state leakage'.
research_citation: "If tests pass with `--seed` but fail randomly, you have state leakage between tests." — oliver-kriska
